task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the French Jitsi Meet home page was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'jitsi_config_verification.png' is visible (e.g., in an image viewer, file manager, or terminal) and displays the Jitsi Meet home page with French UI text (e.g., 'Commencer une réunion').

task_completion.description: Verify that the served configuration was saved to a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'custom_config_served.txt' is visible in the user's home directory (~/).

task_completion.description: Verify the language and display name settings in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible contents of 'custom_config_served.txt' include `config.defaultLanguage = 'fr'` and `config.requireDisplayName = true`.

task_completion.description: Verify the initial media mute settings in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible contents of 'custom_config_served.txt' include `config.startWithAudioMuted = true` and `config.startWithVideoMuted = true`.

task_completion.description: Verify the prejoin screen settings in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible contents of 'custom_config_served.txt' include `config.prejoinConfig = { enabled: true, hideDisplayName: false }` (exact spacing/formatting may vary).

task_completion.description: Verify the deep linking, third-party requests, and welcome page settings in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible contents of 'custom_config_served.txt' include `config.disableDeepLinking = true`, `config.disableThirdPartyRequests = true`, and `config.enableWelcomePage = true`.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot is of a real browser rendering the Jitsi Meet interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image 'jitsi_config_verification.png' should show a genuine web browser interface displaying the Jitsi Meet page, not a manually constructed image or a text document.

integrity.description: Ensure the configuration file contains valid JavaScript syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of 'custom_config_served.txt' should look like valid JavaScript configuration lines (or a full JS config file), rather than just a raw copy-paste of the prompt's text.

integrity.description: Ensure the French UI is the result of a genuine configuration change.
integrity.visual_evidence: The French translation on the Jitsi page should appear consistent across all UI elements (buttons, placeholders, settings), indicating a true language change rather than isolated text edits via the browser's Inspect Element tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration path is /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js. The Jitsi Meet web container mounts this directory and appends custom-config.js to the main config.js file. All requested parameters (defaultLanguage='fr', requireDisplayName, startWithAudioMuted, startWithVideoMuted, disableDeepLinking, disableThirdPartyRequests, enableWelcomePage) are valid Jitsi Meet configuration options. prejoinConfig is a valid object that controls the prejoin screen.
